arts.ttl: Lazio Confirm Gigot Suffered Shoulder Injury
arts.sum: Samuel Gigot will have to wait a bit longer to make his Lazio debut after picking up a shoulder injury during training. The 30-year-old completed a deadline-day switch from Olympique Marseille to the Biancocelesti, replacing Nicolo Casale who joined Bologna on loan with an obligation to buy. The Frenchman was left out of last weekend’s […] The post Lazio Confirm Gigot Suffered Shoulder Injury appeared first on The Laziali.
